deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd — Pleasanton TX
deals.notes: Estate sale, cash transaction $152,000. Contract executed Mar 12. Lien blocker resolved Apr 21. Funded Apr 26, officially closed Apr 27.
deals.next: Post-close follow-up: gift delivery, thank you notes pending

logs.m: Officially closed and funded. Military buyer via Sam VanDenheuvel.
Fernando Castillo signed lien release. Delivered to Alyssa Castillo at Chicago Title.
Lien holder contacted. Spoke with Fabian Cerrillo (family member/wholesaler).

deals.title: Tilden 20ac Land ��� Steven Jimenez
deals.notes: 20 acres, hunting property. Price adjusted to $117,500. First offer dead (Michael Rodriguez, no earnest money). Property clearing complete. Ready for next qualified buyer.
deals.next: Follow up with Steve. Lead with net after close on next offer, not gross price.

logs.m: Amendment signed, price reduced to $117,500. MLS updated. Commission correction needed.
Property clearing complete. Photos posted to social. First offer dead.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751 — Devine TX (Priority Bank REO)
deals.notes: Bank-owned REO. Cleanup and renovation in progress. Matt Toney (HouzzPro) doing work (~$54,877). Electric and water utilities being set up. Listing agreement still needed.
deals.next: Get transformer number on-site. Submit Medina Electric application. Coordinate utilities. Send listing agreement to Priority Bank.

logs.m: Cleanup active. Floor demo complete. Drywall ready. Utilities coordinated.
Work officially starting. Dumpsters dropped this weekend.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr — Devine TX
deals.notes: Underwater ~$93K-$143K. VA loan payoff ~$493K. Market value $350K-$400K. Double-carrying property. Three path options presented to sellers.
deals.next: Call broker first. Then call Matt and Chandler with three options (short sale, VA assumption, price reduction). Schedule decision meeting.

logs.m: Email sent with options analysis. Market value confirmed $350K-$400K.
Express Offers returned $550K (likely inflated). CMA shows $350K-$400K realistic.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path — San Antonio TX
deals.notes: 3BR/2.5BA, relocated to NC. June deadline. Listed $259,900. First showing feedback received. Foundation crack flagged. Insurance adjuster out - roof claim moving forward.
deals.next: Monitor for additional showings or offers. Confirm roof decision with insurance adjuster. Follow up with showing agent MK.

logs.m: MLS live. Sign and lockbox dropped. First showing 9:15am. Feedback received from MK.
Listing agreement signed. Photos received from ATG Photography.

deals.title: 00 Borregas — Elmendorf TX (Land Development)
deals.notes: Land with development potential. Sisters want to extend/end listing. Isaac Linares interested in mobile home development (~$150K offer). Title defect in deed - attorney Van Hutchins preparing correction.
deals.next: Confirm sisters decision on listing extension. Connect Isaac with Josh LT on development partnership. Finalize title correction deed.

logs.m: Isaac development angle expanded to 10-acre lots with mobile homes. Josh LT potential partner.
Jennifer Ball contacted. Title defect confirmed. Attorney Van Hutchins preparing correction deed.

deals.title: 485 W FM 462 — Moore TX (Colton & Abby Brown)
deals.notes: 3BR/2BA, 1,809 sqft, 4.05 acres. Payoff ~$257K. Met May 15 at property. Thin market (3 comps in 10 miles). Recommended list price $295,000-$315,000.
deals.next: Get updated payoff letter from lender. Confirm acreage and renovation status on-site. Schedule professional photos. Get listing agreement signed.

logs.m: Met at property. CMA pulled. Net sheet built. Thin market confirmed.
Prior clients. Going through divorce. Need to finish renovation and sell.

deals.title: 3504 Painted Riv — Schertz TX (Analysis Only)
deals.notes: Investor deal analysis. Off-market flip. Purchase $199K, rehab $65K, ARV $340K. Building branded property analysis template.
deals.next: Pull MLS comps and RPR report. Build analysis sheet. Lock template for reuse.

logs.m: Investor sent deal via link. Used as basis for property analysis tool template.

deals.title: 8527 Green Bliss — San Antonio TX (Rental)
deals.notes: 1,535 sqft, 3BR/2BA, new construction (2025). Lennar in Grace Gardens. Rent $1,595/month. Commission 50/50 co-op. Jimbo answers all questions. Listing agreement to finalize in Skyslope.
deals.next: Finalize listing agreement in Skyslope with all answers locked in. Get signatures. Order vinyl signs. Prepare rental listing.

logs.m: Jimbo replied with all answers. All 12 items confirmed. Ready to finalize and send for signatures.
Intro email sent to Jimbo (Brandon Moran connection). CMA attached.

leads.title: Mike & Alice Howell
leads.detail: Rental being sold, need to move fast. Pivoting to new construction. No HOA requirement. Pre-approval pending with Zach Schaphorst.
leads.next: Confirm Zach pre-approval status. Set up new construction search platform. Identify builders, no HOA.

logs.m: Sent showingnew.com/chrisdrawdy for browsing. Rental clock is ticking.
Rental selling. Pivoting to new construction. Receptive to rate buydowns and incentives.

leads.title: Bryce + Wife (Active Military)
leads.detail: Met on-site at 181 CR 7751. Wife is active military, VA eligible. Recently moved from Ohio, currently renting. Looking to purchase in San Antonio area.
leads.next: Get Bryce contact info. Qualify wife VA eligibility. Send VA Buyers Guide. Connect with VA lender.

logs.m: Met at Priority Bank property during renovation. Dumpster contractor working the job.

leads.title: Milagros Stringer (Brandon Moran connection)
leads.detail: Brandon Moran connection. New construction buyer. Budget $50K down, target ~$1,000/month P+I. Likely Grace Gardens or similar. Plans to rent 2 years then occupy.
leads.next: Follow up on buyer rep signature. Confirm pre-approval. Pull new construction inventory. Set up builder visits.

logs.m: Buyer rep NOT yet signed. Follow up to prioritize. Builder outreach template drafted.
Buyer rep signed (Moran_New-Construction folder).

leads.title: Sallie Mae F.
leads.detail: Garden community connection. Grief to healing through plants story. Potential content collaboration. Real estate potential long-term.
leads.next: Follow up personally. Ask permission for story content. Keep nurturing relationship.

logs.m: Community connection noted. Story angle: Healing Through Gardens.

leads.title: Christina Shine - 13810 Tangle Tree St
leads.detail: Met at garden event May 9. Property ~90% complete, struggling to finish. Currently with another realtor. Open to selling as-is or finished. Pre-market opportunity if Chris finds buyer.
leads.next: Follow up on finishing progress. Offer to promote to Chris network. Stay relational, no pressure.

logs.m: Met at garden event. Already working with realtor. Open to as-is or finished sale.

leads.title: Miss Pat's Neighbor - Son (Unknown Name)

leads.next: Get info from Miss Pat. Son name and contact. Reach out with empathy angle. Assess keep, rent, or sell.

logs.m: Miss Pat mentioned situation. Deceased was gardener. Opportunity: probate/inherited property.

logs.m: Caught up with Jerome. Details pending on buyer and fixer property.

logs.m: Moving forward. Pull CMA and get everything together.

logs.m: Met in person. Investor interested in Schertz area. No further details yet.

leads.detail: Long-standing contact. Chris helped Brandon get started in real estate. Two opportunities: rental listing (8527 Green Bliss) and mom as new construction buyer (Milagros Stringer). Potential long-term investor lead.
leads.next: Send PM company options to Brandon. Confirm visit Wed/Thu with mom for builder walk. Register as buyer agent on first visit.

logs.m: Reached out to builders for options. Price strategies across rate scenarios built.
Met in person. Outlined two opportunities: rental and mom as buyer.
